zh.lifeSummary: 當Owain Wan ap Caradog於大約1070年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Caradawg ap Gruffyd36歲，母親Gwenllian verch Bleddyn15歲。他和Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1116年在威爾士蒙姆爾享年47歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾利本德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Owain Wan ap Caradog于大约1070年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Caradawg ap Gruffyd36岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Bleddyn15岁。他和Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1116年在威尔士蒙姆爾享年47岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾利本德。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Eberhard.
Swedish: soldier's name, apparently from ax ‘ear (i.e. the part of a cereal plant which contains its flowers or seeds)’.

variants.name: Akes
meanings: German: possibly a variant of Ax . The surname Akes is virtually non-existing in Germany.

variants.name: Axt
meanings: German: metonymic occupational name for a woodcutter, carpenter, or maker of axes, from Middle High German ackes, axt- ‘axe’.

nameMeanings.name: Caradog
meanings: English: The English form of the British name Caradwg.

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps derived in the Roman period from the Latin name Eugenius ( see Eugene ); alternatively, possibly from an Old Celtic name meaning ‘born of Esos’. Esos (or Aesos) was a Celtic god known to have been the subject of a cult in ancient Gaul.

nameMeanings.name: Wan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Owain Wan ap Caradog was born about 1070, in Wales, his father, Caradawg ap Gruffyd, was 36 and his mother, Gwenllian verch Bleddyn, was 15. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog. He died in 1116, in Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 47, and was buried in Llebenydd, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Owain Wan ap Caradog est né environ 1070, à Galles, son père, Caradawg ap Gruffyd, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Bleddyn, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog. Il est décédé en 1116, à Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Llebenydd, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Owain Wan ap Caradog um 1070 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Caradawg ap Gruffyd 36 und seine Mutter Gwenllian verch Bleddyn 15. Er hatte mit Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1116 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Monmouthshire, Wales und wurde in Llebenydd, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Owain Wan ap Caradog è nato il circa 1070 nel Galles, il suo padre, Caradawg ap Gruffyd, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian verch Bleddyn, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog. Morì nel 1116, nel Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Llebenydd, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Owain Wan ap Caradogが約1070年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Caradawg ap Gruffydは36歳，母Gwenllian verch Bleddynは15歳であった。彼はMrs. Owain Wan ap Caradogとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1116年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで47歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアレベニーッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Owain Wan ap Caradog(이)가 대략 1070년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Caradawg ap Gruffyd(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Bleddyn(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1116년 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 레베니드에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog. Ele faleceu em 1116, em Monmouthshire, Gales, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Llebenydd, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Owain Wan ap Caradog родился около 1070 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Caradawg ap Gruffyd было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Bleddyn, 15. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog. Он умер в 1116 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности ллебенидд, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog. Murió en 1116, en Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Llebenydd, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
